summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Bad Bridgets
film.talent: Colin Farrell, Steve Coogan, Charlie Heaton, Domhnall Gleeson, Himesh Patel, Niamh Algar, Simone Kirby, Emilia Jones, Alison Oliver
film.announcement: Netflix-backed Irish period thriller directed by Rich Peppiatt announces major cast additions including Colin Farrell and Steve Coogan.

film.title: Citizen Vigilante
film.announcement: Armie Hammer's film secures worldwide distribution following an intervention by Elon Musk.

tv.title: La Vida Barcelona
tv.announcement: Romantic dramedy series directed by Katina Medina Mora boarded by Beta Film for production.

tv.title: The Lady Grace Mysteries
tv.announcement: Teen spy series is set to return for Season 2.
